verse_text: 'O Jerusalem, Jerusalem, the one who kills the prophets and stones those who are sent to her! How often I wanted to gather your children together, as ahen gathers her brood under her wings, but you were not willing!

links.context: The great city... where also our Lord was crucified, is clearly Jerusalem (which kills the prophets; [[LUK.13:34]]). Like Sodom and Egypt, Jerusalem becomes selfsufficient and rebels against God.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
